debug_info.goal:
xs ys : List ℕ
h : ∀ x ∈ xs, (xs ++ ys).head! ≤ x
⊢ (∀ x ∈ ys, (xs ++ ys).head! ≤ x) → ∀ x ∈ ys, ys.head! ≤ x

failed_attempts:
intro x hx
   have h1 : (xs ++ ys).head! = if xs = [] then ys.head! else xs.head! := by
     simp [List.head!]
   split_ifs with h2
   · rw [h1] at h ⊢
     exact h x (Or.inr hx)
   · rw [h1] at h ⊢
     have h3 : ∀ z ∈ xs, xs.head! ≤ z := by
       intro z hz
       exact h z (Or.inl hz)
     have h4 : xs.head! ≤ (xs ++ ys).head! := by
       cases xs <;> simp_all
     have h5 : (xs ++ ys).head! ≤ x := h x (Or.inr hx)
     linarith

intro x hx
   have h1 : (xs ++ ys).head! = if xs = [] then ys.head! else xs.head! := by
     cases xs <;> simp [List.head!]
   cases xs <;> simp_all [List.head!]
   <;> specialize h x (Or.inr hx)
   <;> linarith

intro x hx
   have h1 : (xs ++ ys).head! = if xs = [] then ys.head! else xs.head! := by
     simp [List.head!]
   split_ifs at h1
   · rw [h1] at h
     exact h x (Or.inr hx)
   · have h2 : (xs ++ ys).head! = xs.head! := by simp [h1]
     rw [h2] at h
     have h3 : xs.head! ≤ (xs ++ ys).head! := by simp [h2]
     have h4 : ∀ z ∈ xs, xs.head! ≤ z := by
       intro z hz
       exact h z (Or.inl hz)
     have h5 : xs.head! ≤ ys.head! := by
       cases ys with
       | nil => contradiction
       | cons y ys' =>
         have h6 : y ∈ ys := by simp
         have h7 : xs.head! ≤ y := h y (Or.inr h6)
         simp [List.head!]
         exact h7
     have h6 : ys.head! ≤ x := by
       cases ys with
       | nil => contradiction
       | cons y ys' =>
         have h7 : y = ys.head! := by simp
         have h8 : xs.head! ≤ y := h5
         have h9 : y ≤ x := by
           have h10 : x ∈ ys := hx
           have h11 : (xs ++ ys).head! ≤ x := h x (Or.inr h10)
           rw [h2] at h11
           exact h11
         simp [h7]
         exact h9
     exact h6

       have h14 : ys.head! ≤ x := by
